`,(0,e.jsx)(a.p,{children:`Before concluding the data preparation section, let's examine a common challenge in ad click prediction systems. Similarly, "advertiser ID" and "user ID" take potentially millions of unique values, depending on how many users or advertisers are active on the platform. Given the huge feature space which often exists, it is common to have thousands or millions of features mostly filled with zeroes. In the model selection section, we will cover techniques to overcome these unique challenges.`}),`

`,(0,e.jsx)(a.p,{children:`Feature crossing is a technique used in ML to create new features from existing features. For example, interactions such as "young and basketball" or "USA and football" may positively impact a model's ability to predict click probability.`}),`
